steps.title: Recognize what 'manifest' must express
steps.content: The sun is already down (below the horizon), yet it is manifest in the livid tongues of fire — something normally invisible becomes visible. The word must describe visibility or apparentness despite the sun being hidden.

steps.title: Match meaning to context
steps.content: Perceptible is correct because it means visible or apparent to the senses. The other three fail because Situated is merely positional, Realized implies achievement, and Dwindling describes reduction in intensity rather than visibility. The passage shows something hidden becoming evident through observable phenomena. That matches choice B — B is correct.
